message:
fix: check beads.db presence in verify_zero_artifacts and remove dead code (gt-bzu9f)

- Add sqlite_artifacts to the condition check so active beads.db files
  (not just WAL/SHM) are detected as failures post-migration
- Remove unused fail() function (only fail_check is used)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
